text: I am immersed in a world of innovation, surrounded by sleek glass and modern design. The transparency of the space invites curiosity, and as I step further, I am drawn to the R+D display. I hear words about research, development, and coexistence with intelligent systems. There is a sense of anticipation—here, ideas are actively becoming reality. It is exciting but also humbling, as if I am on the threshold of a future shaped by collective intellect and creativity.
